---
title: "Mary Simpson Coleridge"
---

## Mary Simpson Coleridge

**Dates:** (1808-1887)

**Maiden name:** (Pridham)

### Description

mother of Christabel Coleridge, wife of the Rev. Derwent Coleridge

### Letters

- Letter from April10 th [1883]
- Letter from Ash Wednesday [6 March 1867?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
